title: Cobble Card Quest
body:
This mod adds collectible packs that players can open to obtain Cobblemon cards. Explore the world of Cobblemon, collect your favorite cards, and build your collection! Each pack contains a variety of Cobblemon cards, with some being rarer than others.

 

Cobblemon Cards 

Cobblemon cards feature different Cobblemons. Some cards are rare, while others are common, giving players the thrill of collecting them all.

We're still working on the mod, but the beta will be available soon! In the meantime, we'll be granting access to the alpha version. If you have any suggestions or would like to support this project, you can buy us a coffee.

If you want to keep up to date with the mod and be able to have access to both our alpha and beta, follow us on ko-fi
